text: I feel a curious mixture of anticipation and introspection. The dim lighting and angular corridors evoke a sense of quiet mystery, urging me to contemplate the space and its purpose. Here, surrounded by the conceptual language of 'R+D' and illuminated screens, I sense the presence of innovation and inquiry. It feels as though I stand on the threshold of knowledge—unsettled yet intrigued, eager to explore what lies ahead in this world shaped by human curiosity and creativity.
